rate_summary.rationale: 3BR rice field villas in Canggu cluster at $225–$299 on Airbnb. Babakan location premium + Babakan Kubu address specificity + quality inclusions could support $280–$350. Avoid undercutting Fajar ($160) on quality grounds. Eira ($506) shows ceiling for new boutique 3BR without established reviews.

key_gaps_identified: Most competitors offer pool + WiFi only. Villas with additional amenities (sauna, jacuzzi, cinema, projector) command a premium and generate differentiated search visibility.
Only Ametis and Villa Mana offer staff/butler as standard. Mid-market 3BR rice field villas largely self-catered — gap for Lumina to include staff/cook as a differentiator.
Ametis (no rice field) and Blacksand (no rice field) rely purely on service/design. Lumina's rice field view is a genuine scarcity asset in the Babakan sub-area.
Breakfast inclusion is rare in 3BR Airbnb-segment properties. Including it would help justify a rate above $300.
Multi-platform distribution is weak for most Babakan-area properties. Ametis and Blacksand are the most widely distributed. Lumina should target Airbnb + Booking.com + Agoda as minimum.
No named competitor in the immediate Babakan Kubu area has strong review volume. First-mover advantage for Lumina to become the reference property for that specific address.

Most listings are Airbnb-only. Adding Booking.com and direct site would capture different booking demographics (Booking tends to attract older, less tech-native travellers who also book rice field retreats).
